impact.stat3Label: Industries navigated: Finance · Tech · Health · Education · Pharma · Not-For-Profit

statement.line1: Most strategies don't fail at the top.
statement.body: Adjacent Hustle was built for what happens between the board decision and the teams execution. Where strategy dissolves into ambiguity, conflicting priorities, and human friction.
statement.statLabel: of change initiatives fail to meet their objectives

founder.quote: "I built Adjacent Hustle because the gap between board decisions and the people leading them was too wide, and too costly, to leave unmanaged."
founder.name: Niruja Nagarajah

cta.headline: Bring order to the chaos.
cta.body: If you're navigating something complex and need a trusted partner who has done this before—let's talk.

methodologyTeaser.subheadline: Five structured phases. A forensic data model at the center. Every decision mapped, sequenced, and executed with zero operational leakage.
methodologyTeaser.headline: Organizational architecture. Not soft HR support.

phase1.title: Strategic Synthesis & Definition
phase1.desc: Executive intent → concrete Target Operating Model.

phase2.title: The Data Blueprint
phase2.desc: Timestamped, forensic talent audit and future-state modeling, down to every role.

phase3.title: Resource & Skill Alignment
phase3.desc: Specific skills, not job titles, mapped to the future state.

phase4.title: Tactical Sequencing
phase4.desc: We don't suggest meetings. We book the calendars.

phase5.title: Operational Integrity & Governance
phase5.desc: Single Source of Truth maintained throughout. Zero friction at landing.

credibilityStrip.quote: "Niruja supported HR work for a complex amalgamation project that I was leading. She was knowledgeable, organized, hard-working, flexible and decisive. She had an excellent ability of quickly assessing needs and was always solution-oriented. She always brought relevant recommendations to the decision-makers and delivered work on time while navigating changing project circumstances (as they always do). I appreciated her ongoing communication throughout the project and her risk assessment and mitigation approach." — Joanie Bouchard, Chief Transformation Officer

hero.headline: Turn transformation into clarity and execution.
hero.subheadline: We partner with CEOs and Senior Executive teams to plan, communicate, and land complex organizational change. Backed by data, executed without leakage.

item3.title: Change and Transformation
item3.desc: Comprehensive change delivery so transformation lands cleanly at every level.

item4.title: M&A Integration
item4.desc: Bring stability and structure to complex integrations and divestitures

item5.title: Executive Advisory
item5.desc: Data-driven decision support: scenario modeling, risk flags, and sequenced next steps

item6.title: Fractional Leadership
item6.desc: Stabilize today and build future operating systems that sustain beyond the engagement

item7.title: Workshops for Change Leaders
item7.desc: Build and refine capabilities in your change leaders

services.subheadline: We handle the organizational work that requires both strategic clarity and the operational discipline to execute. Under real pressure, on real timelines.
services.headline: Services built for transformation.

item1.title: Organizational Design & Effectiveness
item1.desc: Design and land operating models that work.

item2.title: People Operations
item2.desc: Operational rigor for the people side.

testimonial.quote:
"Niruja brings a rare combination of deep human capital expertise and pragmatic change leadership. She has a strong ability to quickly understand complex organizational contexts and translate strategy into clear, actionable solutions that leaders can actually execute. Whether working with executives on transformation priorities or partnering with teams through periods of ambiguity, Niruja consistently brings clarity, structure, and calm.

What truly distinguishes Niruja is her systems-level thinking paired with a genuine, human-centered approach. She asks the right questions, challenges assumptions thoughtfully, and ensures that people, performance, and culture are always considered together—not in isolation. Clients trust her quickly, and colleagues value her judgment, integrity, and collaborative style.

I would highly recommend Niruja to any organization seeking a trusted advisor in transformation, organizational effectiveness and design."
testimonial.author: Karen Calder
